post.description:
Transcribe a YouTube video.

The response format is determined by the `Accept` request header:
- `application/json` (default): JSON object with transcription result and metadata.
- `text/plain`: Raw transcription text.

Args:
    yt_request (YTVideoTranscribe): YouTube video URL, language code, and desired response format.

Raises:
    HTTP 500: If an unexpected error occurs during transcription.

200.description: Transcription result. Content type depends on the `Accept` request header.

post.description:
Transcribe and summarize a YouTube video.

The response format is determined by the `Accept` request header:
- `application/json` (default): JSON object containing the generated summary.
- `text/plain`: Raw summary text.
- `text/srt`: SRT subtitle file of the video transcription used for summarization.

Args:
    yt_request (YtVideoSummarize): YouTube video URL, summarization type, language code, and whether to use existing YT transcription.

Raises:
    HTTP 500: If an unexpected error occurs during transcription or summarization.

200.description: Summarization result. Content type depends on the `Accept` request header.

example.summary: The video covers the main highlights of the event...

text/plain.example: The video covers the main highlights of the event...

500.description: Internal server error during transcription or summarization.

post.description:
Get detailed metadata for a YouTube video.

Returns a `YoutubeMetadata` JSON object on success, including title, duration,
description, channel URL, available subtitles and transcription languages, upload date, and thumbnail URL.

Args:
    request (YtVideoInfoRequest): Request body containing the YouTube video URL.

Raises:
    HTTP 500: If an unexpected error occurs while fetching video metadata.

schema.title: Response Yt Details Youtube Details Post

500.description: Internal server error while fetching video metadata.

post.description:
Transcribe an uploaded audio file to text.

The response format is determined by the `Accept` request header:
- `application/json` (default): JSON object with transcription result and metadata.
- `text/plain`: Raw transcription text.
- `text/srt`: SRT file download. The `Content-Disposition` filename is derived from the
  uploaded file name (e.g. `nagranie.mp3` → `nagranie.srt`).
  Requires `transcription_response_format=srt` in the form data.

Parameters:
- uploaded_file (UploadFile): The audio file to be transcribed.
- lang (LANG_CODE): The language of the input audio in ISO-639-1 format.
- transcription_response_format (WHISPER_RESPONSE_FORMAT): The desired format of the transcription response (default: SRT).

Raises:
- HTTP 400: If the uploaded file is not a valid audio file or has an unsupported extension.
- HTTP 500: If an unexpected error occurs during transcription.

200.description: Transcription result. Content type depends on the `Accept` request header.

text/srt.description: SRT file download. Returned when `Accept: text/srt` and `transcription_response_format=srt`. The filename in `Content-Disposition` is derived from the uploaded file name (e.g. `nagranie.mp3` → `nagranie.srt`).

example.error: Invalid file type. Only audio files are accepted
An error occurred while processing the audio file

post.description:
Transcribe and summarize an uploaded audio file.

The response format is determined by the `Accept` request header:
- `application/json` (default): JSON object containing the generated summary.
- `text/plain`: Raw summary text.

Parameters:
- uploaded_file (UploadFile): The audio file to be summarized.
- type (SUMMARIZATION_TYPE): The type of summary to generate (concise, tldr, detailed).
- lang (LANG_CODE): The language of the input audio and desired summary in ISO-639-1 format.

Raises:
- HTTP 400: If the uploaded file is not a valid audio file or has an unsupported extension.
- HTTP 500: If an unexpected error occurs during transcription or summarization.

200.description: Summary result. Content type depends on the `Accept` request header.

example.summary: The speaker discusses the key points of the meeting...

text/plain.example: The speaker discusses the key points of the meeting...

example.error: Invalid file type. Only audio files are accepted

500.description: Internal server error during transcription or summarization.

example.error: An error occurred while processing the audio file

200.description: Batch transcription result for all audio files found in the directory.

207.description: Partial success — some files failed to transcribe.

example.text: Processed 5 audio files. Successful: 3. Failed: 2. Failed files: /path/a.mp3, /path/b.wav

400.description: Directory does not exist or path is not a directory.

403.description: Endpoint not available in non-local mode.

500.description: Internal server error during recursive transcription.

example.error: An error occurred while processing the directory

get.description: List all process artifacts with optional filtering.
Get a specific artifact by ID.
Get the content of an artifact in chunks to handle large texts efficiently.

post.description:
Get detailed metadata for a YouTube video.

Returns a `YoutubeMetadata` JSON object on success, including title, duration,
description, channel URL, available subtitles and transcription languages, upload date, and thumbnail URL.

Args:
    request (YtVideoInfoRequest): Request body containing the YouTube video URL.

Raises:
    HTTP 500: If an unexpected error occurs while fetching video metadata.

schema.title: Response Yt Details Youtube Details Post

500.description: Internal server error while fetching video metadata.

get.description: List all process artifacts with optional filtering.
Get a specific artifact by ID.
Get the content of an artifact in chunks to handle large texts efficiently.

title.title: Title
title.description: The title of the YouTube video

full_title.title: Full Title
full_title.description: The full title of the YouTube video, which may include additional information

filesize.title: Filesize
filesize.description: The size of the video file in bytes

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: The duration of the video in seconds

duration_string.title: Duration String
duration_string.description: A human-readable string representation of the video duration

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the YouTube video

channel_url.title: Channel Url
channel_url.description: The URL of the YouTube channel that uploaded the video

language.title: Language
language.description: The primary language of the video content

subtitles.title: Subtitles
subtitles.description: A dictionary of available subtitles, organized by language code and file extension

available_transcriptions.title: Available Transcriptions
available_transcriptions.description: A list of available transcription languages

upload_date.title: Upload Date
upload_date.description: The date and time when the video was uploaded

thumbnail.title: Thumbnail
thumbnail.description: The URL of the video thumbnail image

name.title: Name
name.description: Name or language of the transcription

YtVideoInfoRequest.title: YtVideoInfoRequest
YtVideoInfoRequest.description: Request model for acquiring youtube video details like title, description, list of subtitles

lang.title: Language code of transcription and final summarization text

use_yt_transcription.title: Use YT transcription or generate new one. If YT transcription is nto found then transcription will be generated

YtVideoSummarize.title: YtVideoSummarize
YtVideoSummarize.description:
Request model for summarizing YouTube video

lang: The language of the input audio. Supplying the input language in
          [ISO-639-1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639-1_codes) format will
          improve accuracy and latency.
